Description: Increases turret base damage.
Increases shots per second. Faster firing speed.
Rotates faster to track targets.
Increases targeting range.
Raises chance for critical hits. Max 50%.
Increases damage multiplier for critical hits.
Enlarges explosion area of missiles.
Damages nearby enemies hit by explosions.
Increases chance for shots to pierce through enemies.
Reduces the damage lost on each pierced enemy.
Adds more pellets per shotgun shot.
Reduces damage lost over distance for shotgun.
Damage increases the longer it hits the same target.
Applies a slowing effect on enemies hit.
Pushes enemies back on hit. Stronger knockback per level.
Allows the shot to bounce to additional enemies.
Increases how far the bounce can search for the next enemy.
Reduces the delay between bounces (bounces happen faster).
Increases damage dealt on bounces (as a percent modifier).
Widens the cone area for cone attacks, hitting more enemies.
Reduces the delay before explosions trigger.
Shoots further ahead of moving targets (better leading).
Increases how many traps can be active at once.
Ignores a percent of enemy armor on hit.
Chance for this turret to fire a multi-pellet shot. If it fails, it fires a single projectile instead.
Chance for hits to apply knockback. Higher chance means more enemies get pushed back.
Chance for attacks to start bouncing to additional targets. If it fails, only the primary target is hit.
Chance for hits to apply slow. Higher chance makes it more reliable to keep enemies slowed.
Chance for hits to ignore enemy armor (based on your Armor Penetration stat). If it fails, the hit uses 0% armor penetration.
Upgrade effect not documented.
